hero.name: Harshal Parekh
hero.role: AI/ML Developer at GenextWebs Technologies, Surat — Generative AI, computer vision, and multi-agent systems.
hero.pitch: B.Tech Computer Engineering graduate (CGPA 8.41/10) with production experience across the full build cycle — model integration, API design, cloud deployment, and client delivery.

about: Computer Engineering graduate with production experience building AI pipelines, cloud-deployed APIs, and end-to-end automation systems. Shipped Generative AI, computer vision, and multi-agent workflow systems on Google Cloud and AWS. Currently designing and integrating AI/ML features directly into client-facing production web applications at GenextWebs Technologies — owning work from requirement scoping through deployment, and building the Python-based ML/AI tooling that sits inside the team's web stack.

education.issuer: C.K. Pithawalla College of Engineering & Technology — Gujarat Technological University · CGPA 8.41/10, zero backlogs across all 8 semesters

experience.title: AI/ML Developer
bullets: Designing and integrating AI/ML features — Generative AI, computer vision, and NLP components — directly into client-facing production web applications, owning delivery from requirement scoping through deployment.
Building and maintaining Python-based ML/AI tooling inside the company's web development stack, moving features from prototype to production release alongside the engineering team.

experience.title: AI Engineer Intern
bullets: Built end-to-end Generative AI photoshoot pipelines for garment and jewellery clients — a 5-agent n8n DAG (Image Analyzer, Creative Director, Prompt Writer, Anchor Generator, Batch Generator) with Cloudflare R2 storage — cutting manual design effort 60% across 5+ client brands.

Exposed AI pipelines, including extended AI video generation via GCP Console APIs, as REST services through FastAPI and Docker — cutting turnaround time 40% and enabling reuse across 5+ internal and client-facing apps.

projects.name: Apple Esports ERP
projects.description: Full-stack, multi-branch ERP for a gaming café chain, built solo. Real-time PC session management, usage-based billing with split payments, digital wallets, reservations — 8 branch-scoped SignalR hubs, deployed as 7 containerized services on AWS EC2 behind Nginx with Let's Encrypt SSL and automated Postgres backups.

projects.name: AI CCTV Surveillance
projects.description: Real-time surveillance app on YOLOv8 hitting 90%+ detection accuracy for safety-compliance monitoring, with multi-class tracking, automatic alert logging, and image capture. Statistics dashboard plus on-demand PDF reports, deployed serverless on Streamlit with zero cold-start cost.

projects.name: Speech → Sign Language
projects.description: Accessibility app converting spoken language into sign language using Google Speech-to-Text ASR at 85%+ accuracy, mapping transcriptions to 200+ vocabulary entries through ML classification models.
